title: bromelia gurkeniana
intro: Bromelia gurkeniana, also known as the pine-pineapple, is a tropical plant belonging to the bromeliad family, characterized by its unique pineapple-like appearance and edible fruit. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, colds, and sore throats. The health benefits of Bromelia gurkeniana include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in reducing fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and poultices, often used to soothe coughs and ease digestive discomfort.
